aliases: Pro-VS 4 MP Turret IP Camera with IR

storage.notes: Supports Automatic Network Replenishment (ANR) — backfills NVR recordings from the camera's local SD card after a network outage.

features: ONVIF Profile S, Profile G, and Profile T conformance (explicitly confirmed)
120dB WDR, 2D/3D DNR, BLC, HLC, digital defog
release_notes: Pro-VS is a separate LTS product line from Platinum and Pro-X, listed on LTS's official NDAA-Compliant Products page. This model is one of LTS's most widely resold Pro-VS cameras, commonly bundled with Pro-VS NVRs.

frigate.notes: Confirmed protocol stack includes RTSP and full ONVIF Profile S/G/T conformance (per retailer-published datasheet), which is a strong signal for reliable Frigate/generic ONVIF NVR compatibility, but the exact RTSP path was not found in sources reviewed — check the camera's own web UI or ONVIF discovery.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF Profile S/G/T conformance explicitly confirmed — this is one of the better-documented ONVIF compliance statements found across the LTS catalog.

blue_iris.notes: Strong ONVIF conformance makes this a likely good fit, though not independently confirmed with Blue Iris specifically.
